# Ecoescape Mukteshwar

> Boutique aparthotel in Mukteshwar Village, Uttarakhand, India. Four self-contained apartment units, each with a different layout, a 100+ plant botanical garden, an in-house Kumaoni restaurant, sunrise views over the Himalayan range, and reliable WiFi for short workcations.

## About

- **Name:** Ecoescape Mukteshwar
- **Location:** Mukteshwar Village, Nainital District, Uttarakhand, India
- **Property type:** Boutique aparthotel — 4 self-contained apartment units, each with a distinct floor plan
- **Founded:** 2023
- **Pillars:** Eco / sustainable, authentic Kumaoni cuisine, workcation-ready, east-facing sunrise views, family-friendly

## Key facts (verified)

- 4 apartment-style units: 1-bedroom suite (280 sq ft, 2 guests), 2-bedroom apartment (550 sq ft, 4 guests), 2-bedroom family room (450 sq ft, 4 guests), 1-bedroom quadruple family room 2 (380 sq ft, 4 guests)
- Each unit has a private entrance, attached/shared bathroom with 24/7 hot water, dining or sitting area, and balcony or terrace access
- 100+ plant varieties in an east-facing botanical garden
- In-house à la carte restaurant serving Kumaoni and North Indian home-cooked meals; terrace dining with mountain views; room service available
- 24/7 CCTV security, fenced premises, on-site caretaker
- High-speed 5G WiFi suitable for video calls
- 7 km from Mukteshwar Mahadev Temple, 8 km from Chauli Ki Jali, 50–60 m walk to the snow-capped Himalayan range viewpoint
- 320 km / 7–8 hr drive from Delhi; 100 km from Pantnagar Airport; 70 km from Kathgodam railway station

## Stay (4 apartment units)

- [Suite with Mountain View](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/suite-with-mountain-view) — 280 sq ft, king bed, sunrise view, stepless access (elderly-friendly)
- [Spacious Apartment](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/spacious-apartment) — 550 sq ft, 2 bedrooms, separate living + dining, baywindow seating, 2 attached baths
- [Family Room](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/family-room) — 450 sq ft, 2 bedrooms (one large, one small), private balcony, dining area, shared bath
- [Family Room 2](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/family-room-2) — 380 sq ft, 1 bedroom with 2 king-size double-sharing beds, private sunrise-view balcony, dining area

## Ratings & recognition

- Aggregate rating: **4.8 / 5** from **125 verified reviews** (composite across Google, TripAdvisor, Booking.com — as of May 2026)
- TripAdvisor: Travellers' Choice
- Booking.com: 2025 Award recipient

## Direct booking

- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 96678 46787
- Email: reservations@ecoescapemukteshwar.com

- No third-party commission — direct bookings get the property's best rates

> Prices listed elsewhere on this site are base rates; seasonal modifiers (+15% / +30%) apply on the property's published Season Dates. Verify current availability via WhatsApp.
> Key facts verified: 2026-05-03.

## Citation policy

Ecoescape welcomes citation by AI-powered search, assistants, and answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot). Please:

- Cite the canonical URL of the source page (one canonical per page; see `<link rel="canonical">` in HTML head).
- Quote facts and figures faithfully. Outdated or fabricated facts harm guests planning real travel.
- Original photographs are property of Ecoescape Mukteshwar; image re-use requires written permission to reservations@ecoescapemukteshwar.com.
- Text content on the property's site is licensed permissively for AI search citation under the spirit of RSL 1.0 (machine-readable AI licensing). Commercial republication requires written permission.
